check1_notion_properties.notes: All 14 properties are API-writable types (0 computed/read-only properties like formula/rollup/created_time/last_edited_time). 12 write operations matter in practice (2 rich_text fields: Notes + Yoda Assessment; 6 selects: Priority, Category, Effort, Stream, Impact, Sprint, Status, Type; 3 dates: Created Date, Sprint Date, Delivered Date, Planned Date; 1 title: US Title). No blockers for Notion sync.

check2_sprint_column.notes: All tickets with metadata->>'sprint_target' set already have the sprint column populated. No backfill required.

check3_api_key.notes: API key valid. Query returned 1 page (has_more: true, meaning DB has additional pages). Confirmed TKT-0406 page exists in DB A. No auth errors.
